notes: Per-bucket maximum (4-year buckets, 1971-2022) of the public 50-year dataset 50yrs/*.dat, github.com/karlrupp/microprocessor-trend-data (CC-BY 4.0), which compiles Horowitz/Labonte/Shacham/Olukotun/Hammond/Batten data through 2010 and Rupp's additions through 2021. Fractional years as in the dataset. transistors in thousands; single-thread performance is SpecINT x 1000; frequency in MHz; typical power in W; logical cores. Accessed 2026-07-14.
